title: Earthy Saudi Arabian Brown Rice Pilaf
description: A comforting, halal-friendly pilaf from Saudi Arabia featuring earthy flavors and a delicious cheese pull. Perfect for a lazy Sunday.
instructions: In a bamboo steamer, combine brown rice, onion, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper.
Pour in the chicken stock, leaving about 1 inch at the top.
Cover the steamer and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
While the rice cooks, heat the ghee or vegetable oil in a small pan over low heat.
Add the sultanas to the pan and cook, stirring frequently, until they're lightly toasted and fragrant.
Once the rice is cooked, fluff it with a fork and stir in the toasted sultanas and crumbled feta cheese.
Return the steamer to the heat and cook, covered, for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the pilaf is heated through.
